homeCards.title: Custom CMS implementation
homeCards.subtitle: Connecting markup, configuring templates, components and pages, integrating database data, and adapting the admin area to project requirements.

homeCards.title: Email logging module
homeCards.subtitle: Tracking outgoing emails: subject, recipients, body or template, delivery status, errors, send history, and admin panel viewing.

homeCards.title: Payment module
homeCards.subtitle: FreedomPay, Tarlan Payments and Epayment integrations, unified provider interface, callback/webhook handling, status checks, logging, and error handling.

homeCards.title: AMO CRM integration
homeCards.subtitle: Creating leads from orders, sending order and product composition, receiving and displaying leads and products, and synchronizing basic fields.

homeCards.title: Order management module
homeCards.subtitle: Checkout, client cart, statuses, email notifications, admin/client order data, and typical create, update, and cancel flows.

homeCards.title: REST API for site functionality
homeCards.subtitle: Client-facing data delivery, cart/order/status methods, unified responses, error handling, basic protection, and request validation.

homeCards.title: PHP code support and development
homeCards.subtitle: Bug fixes, feature improvements, issue analysis, and release support in existing projects.

homeCards.title: Application builder refactoring
homeCards.subtitle: Refactoring Instagram account management modules, improving code structure, fixing logic issues, and increasing stability.

homeCards.title: API optimization
homeCards.subtitle: Reducing response time, decreasing database queries, optimizing selections and endpoints, and removing bottlenecks.

homeCards.title: Client migration to Nuxt 3
homeCards.subtitle: Migrating pages and components, adapting API requests, and configuring routing and project structure.

homeCards.title: CMS support during PHP upgrades
homeCards.subtitle: Fixing incompatibilities, updating outdated code paths, and resolving errors caused by PHP version changes.
